# BitRemote

> An app for iPhone, iPad, and Mac to remotely manage downloaders on NAS, seedbox, and home server setups.

## About

BitRemote is a remote download manager for Apple platforms. It connects to your existing downloader over LAN, VPN, or another secure remote access method, so downloads stay on your NAS, seedbox, or server instead of your device.

- Website: https://bitremote.app/en/
- Platforms: iPhone, iPad, Mac (requires iOS / iPadOS / macOS 26.0 or later)
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6477765303
- Publisher: Ark Studios LLC

## Supported Downloaders

- [aria2](https://bitremote.app/en/downloaders/aria2/)
- [qBittorrent](https://bitremote.app/en/downloaders/qbittorrent/)
- [Transmission](https://bitremote.app/en/downloaders/transmission/)
- [Synology Download Station](https://bitremote.app/en/downloaders/synology-download-station/)
- [QNAP Download Station](https://bitremote.app/en/downloaders/qnap-download-station/)

## Features

- Rich accessibility support, including VoiceOver, Voice Control, Larger Text, Differentiate Without Color, and Reduced Motion
- Control remote download tasks from anywhere
- Monitor transfer activity, speeds, statistics, and history
- Review task details, trackers, peers, and files in one place

## Quickstart

- Install BitRemote from the App Store
- Connect your downloader with its host address and credentials
- Manage activity, queues, and remote download tasks from iPhone, iPad, or Mac
